Ice King's Cube

Triggers: Once in a while

Ice Death
Freezes a random enemy. While frozen, they are unable to move or attack for 2 sec. Also, the cooldown times of the target's gear abilities and artifact abilities are increased by 2 sec.
Every time an enemy fighter is frozen, the artifact wearer gains a charge. When the unit has 3 charges, 3 enemies with the greatest damage are frozen. When frozen, they are unable to move or attack for 2 sec. Also, the cooldown times of the enemies' gear abilities and artifact abilities are increased by 1 sec. In addition, they take 125000 magic damage for 2 sec. When the freeze ends, their attack speed is reduced by 20% for 2 sec.

Requirements: 90-100
